metadata.description: Resource group name. All workload resources land here.
Primary location. Region-lock policy will deny anything else.
Short environment tag, e.g. prod, staging, dev.
Entra ID object ID of the admin group OR user that should receive elevated access.
Type of principal for adminGroupObjectId. Use User when deploying with your own account.
Postgres administrator login (Entra group is preferred; this is fallback).
Postgres administrator password (rotate immediately after deploy).
Phase 2: deploy the API plane (ACA env, Web PubSub, Functions, realtime bridge).
Phase 2: deploy DAB. Requires the KV secret "dab-pg-connection" to exist first.
Phase 2: deploy APIM Premium. Requires Entra External ID OIDC values.
APIM publisher email (required when deployApim=true).
Entra External ID OpenID metadata URL (required for DAB/APIM).
JWT audience — your APIM/DAB client app id.
JWT issuer URL.
Phase 6: deploy Microsoft Sentinel (analytics rules + workbook on the LAW).
Phase 4: deploy the Studio (Container App + ACR). Requires deployApiPlane=true.
Image tag for the Studio. Use "bootstrap" on first deploy, then re-deploy with the real tag after `az acr build`.
Optional full image override (registry/repo:tag) — set by azd.
The single location allowed for all resources.

properties.displayName: [format('Sovera — resource groups must be in {0}', parameters('allowedLocation'))]

metadata.description: Object ID of the admin Entra group (Key Vault Admin role).

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq')), 'cmk-postgres')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq'))), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq'))), parameters('adminGroupObjectId'), variables('roleIds').kvAdministrator))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq')), 'cmk-blob')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq'))), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('{0}-kv-{1}', variables('prefix'), variables('uniq'))), parameters('adminGroupObjectId'), variables('roleIds').kvAdministrator))]

metadata.description: Friendly label shown in Postgres for the Entra admin.
Customer ID of the Log Analytics workspace (for ACA env config).
Storage account for the Functions runtime (separate from data blob).
Postgres database name DAB connects to.
Existing user-assigned identity that has Postgres + Key Vault access.
Key Vault secret name holding the DAB Postgres connection string.
Key Vault secret name holding the JWT signing key (or set issuer/audience and use JWKS).
Backend URL for DAB (internal ACA FQDN with https://).
Backend URL for Functions (https://...azurewebsites.net).
Web PubSub hub negotiate URL (Functions endpoint that returns a client access token).
Web PubSub resource name (used to build the management URL for native negotiate).
Entra External ID OpenID metadata URL, e.g. https://<tenant>.ciamlogin.com/<tenantId>/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration
Expected JWT audience (your APIM client app id).

properties.value:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" require-scheme="Bearer" require-signed-tokens="true" output-token-variable-name="jwt">
      <openid-config url="{{oidc-metadata-url}}" />
      <audiences>
        <audience>{{jwt-audience}}</audience>
      </audiences>
      <required-claims>
        <claim name="sub" match="any" />
      </required-claims>
    </validate-jwt>
    <rate-limit-by-key calls="600" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Request.IpAddress)" />
    <quota-by-key calls="100000" renewal-period="86400" counter-key="@((string)context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization","anon"))" />
    <!-- Stamp identity headers for downstream services. DAB reads these into
         the Postgres session via set-session-context. -->
    <set-header name="X-Tenant-Id" exists-action="override">
      <value>@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("extension_tenantId", ((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("tid","")))</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="X-User-Sub" exists-action="override">
      <value>@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("sub",""))</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="X-User-Email" exists-action="override">
      <value>@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("email",""))</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="X-MS-API-ROLE" exists-action="override">
      <value>authenticated</value>
    </set-header>
  </inbound>
  <backend><base /></backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <set-header name="Strict-Transport-Security" exists-action="override"><value>max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload</value></set-header>
    <set-header name="X-Content-Type-Options" exists-action="override"><value>nosniff</value></set-header>
    <set-header name="Referrer-Policy" exists-action="override"><value>no-referrer</value></set-header>
    <set-header name="X-Frame-Options" exists-action="override"><value>DENY</value></set-header>
    <set-header name="Server" exists-action="delete" />
    <set-header name="X-Powered-By" exists-action="delete" />
  </outbound>
  <on-error><base /></on-error>
</policies>

metadata.description: ACA managed environment to host the Studio container.
Existing user-assigned managed identity. Must be grantable AcrPull.
Principal ID of the same identity (for the role assignment).
Public-facing env vars for the Studio (no secrets here).
Image tag to pull. Set by azd / az acr build after the registry exists.
Allow azd to override the full image (registry/repo:tag).
Existing Log Analytics workspace name (created by landing-zone.bicep).
Location for the workbook resource.

content.json:
# Sovera — security & compliance operations

This workbook surfaces the signals an HDS/HIPAA auditor will ask for: CMK key access, admin sign-ins, RLS violations, storage shared-key usage, APIM auth failures.

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" | where OperationName startswith "Key" | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), OperationName | render timechart
content.title: Key Vault operations (last 24h)

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL" | where Message has_any ("row-level security","sovera: tenant mismatch","sovera: missing tenant claim") | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Resource | render timechart
content.title: Postgres RLS / tenant-assertion errors (last 24h)

content.query: StorageBlobLogs | summarize count() by AuthenticationType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render columnchart
content.title: Blob auth method mix (must be 100% OAuth)

content.query: ApiManagementGatewayLogs | summarize calls = count(), errors = countif(ResponseCode >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), BackendUrl | extend errorRate = todouble(errors)/calls | render timechart
content.title: APIM error rate by backend (last 24h)

content.query: SigninLogs | where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal","Microsoft Azure CLI","Microsoft Azure PowerShell") | summarize count() by ResultType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render columnchart
content.title: Admin sign-ins by outcome

properties.displayName: Sovera — Key Vault CMK key access from unexpected principal
properties.description: Fires when a principal other than the Sovera CMK identity reads a CMK key.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "VAULTS"
| where OperationName in ("KeyGet", "KeyWrap", "KeyUnwrap", "KeySign", "KeyDecrypt")
| where identity_claim_appid_g !in (dynamic([
    // allow-list filled in post-deploy with Sovera CMK identity appId(s)
]))
| project TimeGenerated, ResourceGroup, Resource, OperationName, CallerIPAddress,
          identity_claim_upn_s, identity_claim_appid_g, ResultType

properties.displayName: Sovera — Storage shared-key usage detected (should be impossible)
properties.description: Fires on any successful shared-key authentication against Sovera storage. allowSharedKeyAccess is false; any hit indicates a config drift or misuse.
properties.query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where AuthenticationType == "AccountKey"
| where StatusCode < 400
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, OperationName, CallerIpAddress, StatusCode, Uri

properties.displayName: Sovera — Spike in Postgres RLS / tenant assertion errors
properties.description: Fires when more than 25 RLS or sovera tenant-mismatch errors occur in 15 minutes.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL"
| where Category in ("PostgreSQLLogs", "PostgreSQLFlexSessions")
| where Message has_any ("row-level security", "sovera: tenant mismatch", "sovera: missing tenant claim")
| summarize cnt = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Resource
| where cnt > 25

properties.displayName: Sovera — Admin sign-in from new IP
properties.description: Fires when a member of sovera-admins signs in from an IP not seen in the prior 30 days.
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let knownIps = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(1h))
    | where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure CLI", "Microsoft Azure PowerShell")
    | summarize by IPAddress, UserPrincipalName;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure CLI", "Microsoft Azure PowerShell")
| where ResultType == "0"
| where UserPrincipalName has "@"
| join kind=leftanti knownIps on IPAddress, UserPrincipalName
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, ClientAppUsed, AppDisplayName

properties.displayName: Sovera — APIM auth failure spike on a single subscription
properties.description: More than 50 401/403 in 5 minutes from one APIM subscription = abuse or compromised client.
properties.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| extend code = toint(ResponseCode)
| where code in (401, 403)
| summarize cnt = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ApimSubscriptionId, BackendUrl
| where cnt > 50
